notes: Solid Frogger implementation with all core mechanics (road, river, homes, lives, timer, levels, diving turtles), but frog carrying logic runs in update before input is processed causing slight drift, and row 12 boundary check uses >=12 which could miss edge cases; overall a competent and playable build.

A solid playable Frogger clone with working lanes, river riding, homes, timer, lives, pause, and level flow, but it lacks some polish/orientation details and uses simplified visuals and mechanics rather than a near-perfect recreation.
